evidence_refs.source_quote: monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators

payload.description: MTA Board committee overseeing Metro-North Railroad

evidence_refs.source_quote: MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.

payload.description: The Committee will recommend action to the Board on the Final Proposed Budget for 2025.
The Committee Chair will present a draft Metro-North Committee Work Plan for 2025.
A quarterly report to the Committee providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: January 2025 - Approval of 2025 Committee Work Plan

payload.description: The Committee will approve the Proposed Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan for 2025.
The Agency will present its revised 2025 Financial Plan reflecting the 2025 Adopted Budget.
A review of the prior year's performance of railroad service will be provided to the Committee.
Annual report to the Committee on system-wide reliability and availability for elevators and escalators throughout the system.
A report on Metro-North's ridership trends during 2024 based on monthly ticket sales data and train ridership counts.
A quarterly report providing data on key EEO and Human Resources indicators relating to MNR's EEO and Diversity efforts.

tool_args.label: May 2025 - Final Review of 2024 Operating Budget Results

payload.description: A review of the prior year's budget results and their implications for current and future budget performance.

tool_args.label: July 2025 - Mid-Year Update on Railroad Operations

payload.description: The agency will provide Mid-Year update on Railroad Operations.

tool_args.label: July 2025 - Grand Central Terminal Retail Development

payload.description: MTA Real Estate will provide an annual report on leasing and construction opportunities and financial and marketing information related to retail development in Grand Central Terminal.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.
The agency will provide the 2025 Mid-Year Forecast financial information for revenue and expense by month.
The agency will provide comprehensive report on the Safety/Security.
Public comment will be accepted on the 2026 Budget.

payload.claim_text: The Key Performance Metrics book provides the MTA Board and members of the public with a comprehensive overview of monthly LIRR and Metro-North performance indicators including ridership, financial results, train performance, capital project progress, community events, and safety and security.
payload.description: Description of the monthly Key Performance Metrics reporting to the MNR Committee

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting major accomplishments and progress on key initiatives and performance indicators.
payload.description: Monthly President's Report to the MNR Committee

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be given highlighting key operating performance statistics and indicators.
payload.description: Monthly Chief's Report to the MNR Committee

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided that compares the Railroad's actual financial performance against its budget and/or forecast.
payload.description: Monthly Financial Report to the MNR Committee

payload.claim_text: List of procurement action items requiring Board approval. The Non-Competitive items will be first, followed by the Competitive items and then the Ratifications. The list will include items that need a 2/3 vote of the Board for approval.
payload.description: Procurement reporting to the MNR Committee

payload.claim_text: A monthly report will be provided highlighting key safety performance statistics and indicators.
payload.description: Monthly Safety Report to the MNR Committee
Metro-North Railroad Committee oversees Metro-North Railroad per the 2024 Committee Work Plan
The 2024 Metro-North Railroad Committee Work Plan was published by the Metropolitan Transportation Authority

tool_args.label: Finance Committee responsible for budget items

payload.description: Finance Committee is responsible for the 2025 Final Proposed Budget agenda item
December 2024 - 2025 Final Proposed Budget is a scheduled agenda item
April 2025 - 2024 Annual Ridership Report is a scheduled agenda item
May 2025 - Final Review of 2024 Operating Budget Results
July 2025 - Grand Central Terminal Retail Development is a scheduled agenda item
September 2025 - 2026 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment) is a scheduled agenda item
